humanMachine.heroSubtitle: From physical world to information world, building human-machine collaborative super Enterprises. Helping Enterprises understand organizational architecture, process optimization, and human values in the AI era.

physicalWorld.title: Enterprise Physical World
physicalWorld.intro: Help Enterprises organize structure and business processes, define clear positions and responsibilities for digital employees, while maintaining focus on human values.

structure.title: Organization Structure
structure.description: Organize Enterprise structure, define human-AI collaboration relationships

process.title: Process Analysis
process.description: Forward and reverse process analysis to find key nodes where AI can empower

humanValue.title: Human Values
humanValue.description: Maintaining respect and focus on human values in the AI era

infoWorld.title: Enterprise Information World
infoWorld.intro: Guide Enterprises from basic informatization to advanced AI, building a complete digital capability system.

basic.title: Basic Information World
basic.description: Build digital infrastructure, achieve informatization and automation of business processes

informatization.name: Informatization
informatization.desc: Digital Storage and management of business data

iot.name: IoT
iot.desc: Connection between physical and digital worlds

advanced.title: Advanced Information World
advanced.description: Introduce AI capabilities, achieve intelligent upgrade from perception to decision to action

perception.name: Perceptual AI
perception.desc: Intelligent recognition of vision, Voice, and text

generative.name: Generative AI
generative.desc: Content creation, code generation, design assistance

agent.name: Agent AI
agent.desc: Autonomous decision, task execution, multi-agent collaboration

superEnterprise.title: Human-Machine Collaborative Super Enterprise
superEnterprise.intro: Through deep collaboration between humans and AI, create super employees, super teams, and super products/services.

superEmployee.title: Super Employee/Super Individual
superEmployee.description: Personal productivity revolution empowered by AI, every employee can perform beyond normal capabilities

superTeam.title: Super Team/Super Organization
superTeam.description: Human-machine hybrid teams achieve more efficient collaboration and stronger collective intelligence

superProduct.title: Super Product/Service
superProduct.description: AI-driven products and services with unprecedented intelligence and personalization capabilities

metrics.title: Effect Measurement Dimensions
metrics.costDesc: Reduce operational costs, improve resource utilization
metrics.efficiencyDesc: Shorten process cycles, improve output quality
metrics.experienceDesc: Enhance customer and employee experience satisfaction

implementation.title: Implementation Path
implementation.intro: From current assessment to continuous optimization, helping Enterprises steadily achieve AI transformation

assessment.title: Current Assessment
assessment.desc: Assess Enterprise's current digitization level, AI application Status, and organizational readiness

planning.title: Strategic Planning
planning.desc: Develop AI transformation roadmap, clarify goals, milestones, and resource requirements

pilot.title: Pilot Validation
pilot.desc: Select key scenarios for pilot, validate feasibility and accumulate experience

scale.title: Scale Rollout
scale.desc: Based on pilot experience, gradually expand to more business areas and scenarios

optimize.title: Continuous Optimization
optimize.desc: Establish continuous improvement mechanism, constantly optimize AI application effects and organizational capabilities

cta.title: Build Your Super Enterprise
cta.description: Join ZHIHUI AI Community and work with professional consultants to plan your Enterprise's AI transformation journey
